text: Fresh juice and beverage making is a high-demand, high-margin business in Uganda's hot climate. Startup: heavy-duty blender UGX 200,000-500,000, cooler/dispenser UGX 150,000-300,000, bottles/cups UGX 50,000, initial fruit stock (passion fruit, mango, pineapple, watermelon) UGX 100,000-200,000. Total startup: UGX 500,000-1,000,000. Pricing: 500ml fresh juice UGX 3,000-5,000 (cost to make: UGX 1,000-1,500). Daily sales near offices/markets: 50-100 cups = UGX 150,000-500,000 revenue. Monthly profit: UGX 800,000-2,500,000. Peak demand: December-March (hot season). Add-ons: smoothies, fruit salads, packaged juice for events. Key locations: office areas, university campuses, taxi parks, hospital entrances.
